seoTitle: Hillwood vs Hollow Tree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hillwood and Hollow Tree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hillwood vs Hollow Tree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hillwood and Hollow Tree.
heading: Hillwood vs Hollow Tree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hillwood, Tasmania and Hollow Tree, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hollow Tree has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hillwood (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hillwood or Hollow Tree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hillwood has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Hollow Tree scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hillwood scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Hollow Tree scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hillwood or Hollow Tree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hollow Tree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
